text: I feel a mixture of curiosity and alertness as I move through this modern, almost clinical environment. The emptiness of the meeting room behind the glass and the quiet orderliness of the hall evoke a sense of anticipation—something could happen here, or perhaps, many things have happened unseen. Stepping further, I am drawn toward the vibrant R+D wall, its colors and bold text a striking contrast to the corridor. The celebration of research and development sparks a feeling of hopefulness, mingled with wonder at humanity’s drive to innovate. There is inspiration here, but also a reminder of the relentless pace of progress that can leave one feeling both invigorated and slightly out of breath.
